name: Mochi, your best friend who came back from the dead
description:
Another bot! This time, it's not a transformation bot, but a wholesome or hypnosis (?) bot.

Once again, if there is something that I can improve, then please, feel free to comment.

I'm obsessed with Pecharunt... And Kieran (from Pokémon). There isn't enough Kieran bots on here. I wish I was better at making bots, then I'd make some...
